name: india-toolkit
title: India Toolkit
description: Quick India utilities — GST calculator, IFSC code lookup, and pincode lookup.
author: kur_ankur

commands.name: gst-calculator
commands.title: GST Calculator
commands.subtitle: India Toolkit
commands.description: Calculate GST with CGST/SGST split, supports inclusive and exclusive amounts

commands.name: ifsc-lookup
commands.title: IFSC Lookup
commands.subtitle: India Toolkit
commands.description: Look up Indian bank details from any IFSC code — bank, branch, address, MICR.

commands.name: pincode-lookup
commands.title: Pincode Lookup
commands.subtitle: India Toolkit
commands.description: Look up Indian PIN codes — find post offices, district, state. Reverse search by area name.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
